observations.summary: The phrase 'Formless void, darkness on the deep—as things must have been before Time' echoes the primordial state of chaos and darkness that is a recurring motif representing the origin of existence and the beginning of truth's emergence.

source_evidence.quote: Formless void, darkness on the deep—as things must have been before Time, when the first words of truth were spoken.

observations.target_hint: This motif parallels the narrative's frequent references to darkness as a primordial and metaphysical state preceding creation and enlightenment, as seen in multiple chapters describing darkness as both a literal and symbolic presence.

accepted_observations.summary: The phrase 'Formless void, darkness on the deep—as things must have been before Time' echoes the primordial state of chaos and darkness that is a recurring motif representing the origin of existence and the beginning of truth's emergence.
